name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry Norcross, Georgia — Value Pawn & Jewelry is a Miami-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, and disco...
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves customers seeking quick cash through collateral-based lending and asset sales.

The company offers multiple revenue streams: pawn loans (borrowing against personal items), gold and diamond jewelry buying, retail sales of pre-owned merchandise at 25-70% discounts, layaway services, and third-party payment plans. They specialize in jewelry, electronics (Samsung, Apple products), tools, gaming equipment, musical instruments, handbags, and sneakers. Additional services include an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation, an EZ+ Rewards program with points accumulation, and protection plans for jewelry and products.

Value Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through flexible payment options (layaway with 10% down, third-party financing up to 12+ months), daily inventory turnover with online shopping capability, and specialized expertise in precious metals testing and valuation. Their jewelry VIP program offers guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up credits, and free cleaning/freestone replacement. The store maintains extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, weekend availability) to serve working customers.

As a pawn shop, this business model works best for consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable items, but comes with inherent limitations: high short-term costs if loans aren't redeemed, dependence on item resale value, and the transactional nature of pawn arrangements. The company explicitly notes that not all services are available in all areas, and online payments are unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania.
pros: Instant Quote tool provides fast online valuations for electronics within seconds
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 12pm-5pm Sunday) accommodate working customers
Gold and diamond buying includes professional precious metals testing for accurate pricing
Significant discounts on pre-owned merchandise (25-70% off retail) with daily inventory updates
EZ+ Rewards program grants points on pawns, redeems, sales, and purchases with online management
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down with monthly payments) and third-party financing up to 12+ months
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed future loan amounts and 100% trade-up values on jewelry purchases
cons: Pawn loans carry undisclosed fees and terms that require in-person consultation—APR and specific costs not listed online
Limited transparency on loan redemption timeframes, interest rates, and default consequences
Service availability varies by location; online payments excluded in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Pawn model requires surrendering physical collateral with no guarantee of reclaiming items if unable to repay
Third-party financing subject to credit eligibility with unspecified terms and approval processes
best_for: Consumers with urgent cash needs who own electronics, jewelry, or tools and can repay short-term loans
Individuals seeking to sell gold, diamonds, or jewelry for immediate cash at professionally tested valuations
Budget-conscious shoppers looking for deeply discounted pre-owned brand-name electronics and accessories
People preferring flexible payment options like layaway (10% down) over traditional retail financing
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for Miami-area consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable items and can afford short-term repayment, or those seeking steep discounts on pre-owned electronics and jewelry. The main caveat is that pawn loans are high-cost short-term debt with undisclosed fees and risk of forfeiting collateral—this is not a sustainable financial solution for ongoing cash needs and should only be used when other options are unavailable.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based borrowing with undisclosed fees and terms)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with precious metals testing
Retail sales of pre-owned electronics, tools, jewelry, gaming equipment, and accessories
Instant Quote online valuation tool for electronics
Layaway services with 10% down payment and monthly installments
Third-party payment plan financing (up to 12+ months, credit-dependent)
EZ+ Rewards program with points accumulation and online account management
Online shopping with daily new arrivals and inventory browsing
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan (1-year or lifetime enrollment with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up credits)
Product Protection Plans covering computers, audio/video, and merchandise for one-time fee
Free jewelry cleaning and freestone replacement (Jewelry VIP members)
